patch_details: WIN-017 detail_evidence: Replaced uncited EXP-287 spectroscopic-class assertion ('The cleanest independence test is the raw Gaia astrometric residuals...') with softer cross-validation claim ('A second independence check: cross-validation against spectroscopic-class distance estimates... shows the same 1/d scaling'). WIN-004 detail_verdict_text: Inserted LLSVP+timing-independence parenthetical after 'no derivation of azimuthal asymmetry': '(MHD attributes the African-American asymmetry to LLSVP-modulated core flow — a structural mechanism the dome's radially symmetric aetheric vortex cannot reproduce, regardless of when the prediction was made)'. Closes c5 H1-moderate.

WIN-004 finding: Appended asymmetry kill-shot clause: '; African-American decay asymmetry falsifies a radially symmetric aetheric vortex regardless of prediction timing'. Converts summary row from mechanism-comparison to structural-falsification framing. Closes c5 stronger-argument H3-minor carry-forward.
